This renovated, easy living family home is looking for a great family to come and enjoy its many benefits. The main living space is elevated and on one level, linking to the wonderful garden and entertaining area. The garden backs onto farmland giving the property a real sense of space.

There is an open plan kitchen and dining area which connects to a large lounge and office space. Down the hallway is the master bedroom, across the hall is with one single room and the family bathroom with separate bath opposite. There are two additional double bedrooms further down the hallway, one with an en-suite bathroom.

There is internal access to the double garage with workshop and a good sized rumpus or media room.

This property is fully fenced with automated gate. Public transport is directly outside the property.
St Heliers Beach, Pony Club, Meadowbank shopping centre and the Glen Innes train station are all nearby.

Modern 4-Bedroom Townhouse for Rent in New Windsor

Welcome to 73 New Windsor Road, a modern 4-bedroom townhouse that combines style and comfort. This brand-new property boasts a contemporary design with modern features throughout.

Located in the heart of New Windsor, the townhouse offers easy access to the motorway, supermarkets, and shops, ensuring a convenient and connected lifestyle.
